finding_results.notes: Idiolect separation strengthened in flagged exchanges: Mara now leads with interrogative reframing and evidence framing; Clay deflects through command/process language; Lena moves from procedural briefing into compact blunt resistance under pressure. Lexical convergence was reduced by replacing repeated records rhetoric and removing the exact word 'documented' from the 189-241 span.
finding_results.summary: Dialogue in the flagged sections now carries distinct character rhythm under pressure, avoids shared slogan cadence, and satisfies the documented-word cap in the acceptance test window.

summary: Revised chapter_03 dialogue for idiolect fidelity and pressure cadence, with the packet's sole finding resolved and evidenced by line citations.
